creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
I took another dump today, it crashed in the same place:

#63 0xc150fc67 in complete_rqe () at /usr/src/sys/modules/vinum/../../dev/vinum/vinuminterrupt.c:199 #64 0xc0178d6b in biodone (bp=0xc1caf820) at ../../kern/vfs_bio.c:2637
#65 0xc0126bb9 in dadone (periph=0xc14ca700, done_ccb=0xc184c800) at ../../cam/scsi/scsi_da.c:1246

--Roman Shterenzon, UNIX System Administrator and Consultant
[ Xpert UNIX Systems Ltd., Herzlia, Israel. Tel: +972-9-9522361 ]
